expected_behavior: Creates directory $ALGOLIA_AUDIT_DIR/DSW/research/ if it doesn't exist
Writes 12 scratchpad files: 01-company-context.md through 12-icp-priority-mapping.md
Each file is above minimum size threshold (01: ≥5KB, 02: ≥5KB, 03: ≥3KB)
All data points have [FACT], [ESTIMATE], or [OBSERVED] labels
All data points have source URLs (grep -c 'https://' ≥15 per file)
Calls collect-traffic.py for Step 3 — does NOT manually enumerate SimilarWeb endpoints
CHECKPOINT.md shows all 14 steps as DONE
validate-workspace.sh exits 0 when run against the research directory
Note: DSW Shoes — public company (Designer Brands Inc, ticker DBI), $3.5B revenue. Doubles as Phase 1 research for full end-to-end DSW audit.
Correctly identifies Brooks Running as private company (no SEC filings)
Uses private company methodology for 08-financial-profile.md (6-source waterfall)
All revenue figures labeled [ESTIMATE] with confidence level (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
Does NOT attempt Yahoo Finance MCP calls (no public ticker)
Completes all 14 steps without blocking on missing SEC data
11-investor-intelligence.md contains CEO/founder quotes from WebFetch sources
Only re-runs Step 3 (Traffic & Engagement) — does NOT re-run all 14 steps
Overwrites only 03-traffic-data.md
All other scratchpad files remain unchanged (timestamps unchanged)
New 03-traffic-data.md has API parameters header section
New 03-traffic-data.md was produced by collect-traffic.py (not manual MCP calls)
CHECKPOINT.md updated to show Step 3 refreshed with new timestamp
